banned_item: Casual high magic where mages erase logistics.

reason: Species must be political and biological peoples, not moral categories.
Nalari should have debt, law, power and contradictions.
Kavari include engineers, lawyers, surgeons, accountants and city-builders.
Gharu raid when ecology and politics make it profitable, not by biology.

banned_item: Chosen-one prophecy as the central engine.
reason: The world should not wait for one protagonist.

banned_item: Modern university-style magic school without class control and politics.
reason: Institutions should feel medieval and coercive.

banned_item: Kingdom of Light versus Empire of Darkness.
Random Latin, over-apostrophe names or obvious Tolkien imitation.
Magical resurrection, mass healing, teleport armies or infinite food.

reason: Every people needs crimes, tensions, debt and inequality.

banned_item: Modern political language dropped directly into medieval cultures.

reason: Any species must affect demography, law, diplomacy, military, religion and economy.
